/usr/bin/cc  -std=c11 -D_DEFAULT_SOURCE=1 -D_GNU_SOURCE=1 -Wall -Wextra -O0 -g3 -fno-omit-frame-pointer -fno-inline -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/nDPIsrvd-collectd.dir/link.d "CMakeFiles/nDPIsrvd-collectd.dir/examples/c-collectd/c-collectd.c.o" "CMakeFiles/nDPIsrvd-collectd.dir/utils.c.o" -o nDPIsrvd-collectd
